hero.heading: Gaur Chrysalis Plume at Yamuna Expressway.
hero.body: Themed luxury 3 & 4 BHK residences in Sector 22-D, Yamuna Expressway with open green living, premium amenities, and fast access to the NCR growth corridor.

intro.heading: A single-residential showcase for Gaur Chrysalis Plume.
intro.body: Gaur Chrysalis 2.0 is positioned as a thoughtfully designed residential landmark near the upcoming Jewar International Airport, combining modern architecture, open green spaces, and a refined lifestyle ecosystem.

propertiesHeading.heading: Gaur Chrysalis Plume details at a glance.

properties.title: Gaur Chrysalis Plume
properties.body: Themed luxury apartments in Sector 22-D on Yamuna Expressway with 3 BHK and 4 BHK layouts, premium development scale, and a future-ready location.

details.subtitle: At Sector 22-D, Yamuna Expressway
overview: Thoughtfully designed residential landmark in the rapidly evolving Yamuna Expressway corridor.
Close to the upcoming Jewar International Airport and NCR growth hubs.
Spacious 3 & 4 BHK residences with modern architecture, open green spaces, and premium amenities.

experience.heading: Iconic living wrapped in green, resort-style comfort.
experience.body: The project emphasizes expansive layouts, a premium amenity mix, secure community planning, and strong connectivity for end users and long-term investors.

process.title: Location advantage
process.body: Sector 22-D on Yamuna Expressway connects quickly to Jewar Airport, Pari Chowk, Jaypee Sports City, Galgotias University, and the upcoming Film City.

process.title: Residential comfort
process.body: 3 & 4 BHK layouts are supported by lifestyle amenities including pool, courts, indoor games, gymnasium, yoga deck, and kids play areas.

services.heading: Advisory support for Gaur Chrysalis Plume buyers.

items.title: Luxury acquisition
items.body: Confidential buyer representation for premium villas, apartments, plots, and off-market opportunities.

items.title: Owner representation
items.body: Position your property with premium presentation, qualified enquiries, and negotiation support.

items.title: Investment advisory
items.body: Evaluate land, commercial spaces, rental yield, and development potential with a practical lens.

testimonial.quote: “Gaur Chrysalis Plume brings location, themed luxury, and amenity-led residential living into one focused Yamuna Expressway opportunity.”

contact.heading: Request details for Gaur Chrysalis Plume.
contact.body: Share your name and contact details to receive pricing guidance, availability updates, brochure support, or a private site visit for Gaur Chrysalis Plume.
